task.title: Configuring a systemd service to start after the network has been started

context.p: RHEL installs systemd service files in the /usr/lib/systemd/system/ directory. You can create a drop-in snippet in /etc/systemd/system/<service_name>.service.d/ to start a service after the network is online.
This snippet’s settings override any conflicting settings in the original service file.

step.cmd: Open a service file in the editor:
Enter the following, and save the changes:
